content: Read live orchestrator-role/SKILL.md and listed .pmcro/trails/cto/ before any edit. Found prior sealed trail 67f24fd5-8b75-4a5f-b8f8-ba9393ff347d (disposition: accept) which already fixed the Law-2 relative chain, renamed the Invocation Contract heading, and converted the Reference Files section -- confirmed by reading the live file, not by trusting the trail's own self-report.

Six remaining '../../' instances found in the live file, all pointing at this same package's own references/ and scripts/ subfolders (never at .agents/rules/): one in step 1 (trail-schema.md), two in step 2 (scripts/ + trail-schema.md), one in step 3 item 4 (earned-constraints.md), one in step 4 (hil-gating.md), one in step 5 (earned-constraints.md), one in Multi-Turn Evolution Work (ralph-loop-mechanics.md). Replaced all six with full repo-relative paths (catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/skills/orchestrator/{references,scripts}/...), matching the style already established in the Reference Files section by the prior trail -- not routed to .agents/rules/, since that location does not contain these files. Each edit applied via Filesystem:edit_file with a preceding dry-run diff confirmation.

Re-read the full file post-edit. Zero remaining '../../' substrings (grep-equivalent visual check across full file content, per EC-010). No other prose altered -- diff limited to the six path substitutions.
Searched repo-wide for '*emory*' before designing the Memory Bank convention -- zero matches, confirming no prior convention exists to conflict with or duplicate.

Read sibling commands/replay-trail.md and commands/seal-trail.md to match frontmatter and prose style (description+Usage line, parameter block, then behavior, EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001 called out explicitly where relevant).

Created catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/skills/orchestrator/commands/brief-session.md: Round Table section walks catalog/skills.json's 10-domain roster, reads each domain's domain-scope/SKILL.md and .pmcro/trails/<domain>/ state, and speaks a persona-voiced but trail-verified status line per domain -- explicitly forbidding fabricated status for domains with no trails or dangling (undisposed) trails. Memory Bank Convention section names the Cline/Roo-Code six-file pattern (projectbrief.md, productContext.md, systemPatterns.md, techContext.md, activeContext.md, progress.md) under .agents/memory-bank/ (sibling to existing .agents/rules/ and .agents/plugins/, per COLONY.md's layering table), specifies activeContext.md as overwrite-per-run and progress.md as append-only, and requires progress.md's 'working' claims to be backed by an ACCEPT-disposition trail rather than session self-report -- consistent with this Colony's own EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001 discipline.

Read the written brief-session.md back from disk (head, 5 lines) immediately after write to confirm the Filesystem MCP write actually landed, per this repo's own known-reliability note in seal-trail.md and this user's documented history of write_file/create_file calls returning success while writing nothing.

Did not create the .agents/memory-bank/ directory or seed its six files in this cycle -- true_intent's item 3 asked that brief-session's *output* follow the convention, not that this cycle pre-populate the Memory Bank content itself (which would require running the Round Table for real, i.e. actually invoking brief-session, a separate action from authoring it). Flagging as an open item for reflect rather than silently expanding scope to include a live brief-session run.
